description: Svelte avoids traversing clean roots by updating batching logic with runtime-runes sample fixtures
rationale: The batching fix and async-pending-effect sample files are one regression fix. The sample and config files exist to prove the same runtime behavior, so they should not be treated as separate components.
notes: Current engine reports error because the implementation file and runtime-runes sample fixture files are disconnected in patch-level call-graph extraction.
